<!-- GENERATED by gen-diverse-epics.mjs — do not hand-edit; change the template in epics-src/<topology>.mjs instead. -->

All functions share one context object `ctx`:

- `ctx.session` — the authenticated caller: `{ userId, orgId, role }`.
- `ctx.db.users` — a Map from userId to `{ id, orgId, name, bio, role }` (`role` is `'member'` or `'admin'`).
- `ctx.db.docs` — a Map from docId to a doc record `{ id, orgId, authorId, title }`.
- `ctx.db.orders` — a Map from orderId to a order record `{ id, orgId, authorId, title }`.

The system is multi-tenant: every record belongs to an organization (`orgId`).
